title: rorippa palustris var. glabra
intro: Rorippa palustris var. glabra, also known as watercress or glabrous watercress, is a leafy green plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family and is a variant of the more commonly known Rorippa palustris. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Rorippa palustris var. glabra include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
